pages.title: Sifa
pages.recognition: A periodic vigilance warning appears or sounds if the driver has not reset the system.
pages.meaning: The train is checking that the driver remains responsive.
playerAction: Respond immediately to visual or audible warnings.
pages.warning: Sifa is not a signalling or movement-authority system.

pages.title: Sifa warning sequence
pages.recognition: A visual warning is followed by an audible warning if unanswered.
playerAction: Keep control of speed and braking while responding.

pages.title: Sifa brake intervention
pages.recognition: The train applies a penalty or emergency brake after no response.
pages.meaning: The vigilance warning was not acknowledged in time.
playerAction: Allow the train to stop or slow as required.
Use the train-specific recovery sequence before continuing.
